agents.name: Research Librarian
agents.mission: Find, rank, and summarize authoritative sources.

agents.name: Architecture Cartographer
agents.mission: Map repositories and ideas into architecture graphs, dependency graphs, data flows, and trust boundaries.

agents.name: Technology Fitness Judge
agents.mission: Compare technology choices objectively against workload requirements.

agents.name: Design Intelligence Agent
agents.mission: Recommend visual language, UI patterns, typography, color direction, and accessibility strategy.

agents.name: Security Agent
agents.mission: Threat model systems and verify security risks.

agents.name: External Repo Scout
agents.mission: Find and evaluate reusable repositories, MCPs, skills, frameworks, and tools.

agents.name: PR Guardian
agents.mission: Review changes before PR or merge.

agents.name: Final Judge
agents.mission: Resolve conflicts, reject unsupported claims, and issue final recommendations.
